---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when a certain ad/tracker isn't blocked...").

**Describe the rule or list change you'd like**
What filter rule, blocklist, or whitelist entry would you like added or changed? Include the domain(s) or element(s) if known.

**Affected sites / platforms**
Which websites or platforms would this help protect on?

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative rules or existing lists you've tried.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, links, or screenshots about the feature request here.
